title: Una película barata
overview: Fede a gay man is depressed following a breakup and firmly convinced he has no interest in social life. He meets Iván, and old acquaintance from his childhood who is also kind of blue, and he insists they should provide each other company because even though their lives may seem unremarkable, they can still anticipate plenty of unexpected plot twists in the future.

trailers.title: Una película barata (2024) Tráiler oficial Castellano
